---
title: "Leaderboards"
format: html
---

```{=html}
<style>
  body {
    background-color: #0C2340; /* A light blue, for example */
    font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
  }
</style>
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#fgbat25 <- fg_batter_leaders(startseason = 2025, endseason = 2025)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

library(tidyverse); library(here); library(kableExtra); library(knitr); source(here("R", "metrics.R")); dl_path <- "C:\\Users\\Owner\\Downloads\\R Baseball\\saberhood_webpage\\data"
st_week <- readRDS(here("data", "st_week.rds"))

st_bat_lead <- batter_leaders(st_week)
st_pa <- st_bat_lead$pa_sum

hrs <- st_pa %>% 
  arrange(desc(HR)) %>% 
  head(5) %>% 
  select(matchup.batter.fullName, HR)
kbl_hrs <- kbl(hrs, position = "float_right") %>% 
  kable_styling() %>% 
  row_spec(0:5, color = "white")

slg <- st_pa %>% 
  arrange(desc(SLG)) %>% 
  head(5) %>% 
  select(matchup.batter.fullName, SLG)
kbl_slg <- kbl(slg, position = "float_left") %>% 
  kable_styling() %>% 
  row_spec(0:5, color = "white")

hit <- st_pa %>% 
  arrange(desc(H)) %>% 
  head(5) %>% 
  select(matchup.batter.fullName, H)
kbl_hit <- kbl(hit, position = "float_center") %>% 
  kable_styling() %>% 
  row_spec(0:5, color = "white")

kables(list(
  kbl_hrs, 
  kbl_slg, 
  kbl_hit
  )
)
```
